name: Shemen Industries Ltd
summary: Shemen Industries Ltd manufactures, markets, and sells industrial products and raw materials for industry and livestock customers in Israel. The company operates in two segments, Food and Agro Food Sector. It offers edible oils and other food products to the consumer, domestic, and institutional markets; and tuna products under the Olive Tree brand. The company was founded in 1919 and is based in Haifa, Israel. Shemen Industries Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Memorandum Ltd.
